name: Alight, Inc.
lede: Alight runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Chennai, Gurugram, Noida and Kochi, covering gcc/gic and ssc.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alight office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alight, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alight runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Chennai, Gurugram, Noida, Kochi), covering gcc/gic and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Alight's India footprint covers Chennai, Gurugram, Noida and Kochi, spanning gcc/gic and ssc. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Alight operate in India?
faq.a: Alight operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alight have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Alight's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Gurugram, Noida and Kochi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Alight run in India?
faq.a: Alight runs gcc/gic and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alight's India GCCs?
faq.a: Alight's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alight's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Alight's India centers, across HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
